01
/
Feature

Transcendental
Clarity

Cookieless Tracking that tells the full story
Capture sales even when cookies fail and privacy settings block everything else.
Influence you can't normally see
Post-purchase surveys rack creator-driven sales that happen without a link or code
Incentivize growth that matters
Tier your commissions, reward more for bringing new customers than converting people already buying.
Scroll
02 / Feature

Ironclad
Protection

Codes that don't escape
LeakProof discounts expire after one use; no Reddit leaks or coupon site theft.
Anti-fraud engine working overtime
Spot self-referrals, suspicious refunds, and fake traffic to protect your margins.
Patterns caught early
Review suspicious orders in real-time, before commissions go out.
Scroll
03 / Feature

Enduring
Loyalty

Landing pages worth sharing
Custom landing pages creators feel proud to share with their audience.
Momentum that compounds // Trust built on transparency
Show progress, celebrate milestones, display real-time earnings - keep ‘em coming back // ambassadors stick around and post more
Credit where it’s due
When multiple affiliates contribute to a sale, everyone gets recognised.
Scroll
04 / Feature

Effortless
Operations

Live in hours
Set up your entire program in hours with guided onboarding and one-click migration.
Payouts & Taxes on autopilot
Scheduled payments, automatic invoice and 1099 generation. Finance never pings you
Support from operators
Talk to people who understand affiliate marketing when you need help.
Scroll
